title: Bone Meal Sugar Cane
description: You can now use bone meal on sugar cane to grow it instantly.
body:
![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a658cb6182f5593321fe28fafcb74e3558add1.gif)

This mod allows you to use bone meal on sugar cane to grow it instantly. 

This is already the behavior in Bedrock Edition, it's just missing from Java Edition for some reason.

Have fun!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
